report_text:
--- CAPABILITIES (CAPA) ---

  - hide graphical window
  - access PEB ldr_data
  - accept command line arguments
  - query or enumerate registry value
  - link function at runtime on Windows
  - get geographical location
  - find graphical window
  - check if file exists
  - get disk size
  - get file version info
  - get system information on Windows
  - read clipboard data
  - capture screenshot
  - link many functions at runtime
  - enumerate gui resources
  - log keystrokes via polling
  - get number of processors
  - log keystrokes
  - get keyboard layout
  - get hostname
  - get common file path
  - query environment variable
  - get disk information
  - persist via Run registry key
  - reference startup folder

  - hide graphical window
  - set global application hook
  - Process::Create Thread [C0038]
  - inspect load icon resource
  - access PEB ldr_data

  - get geographical location

--- FILE IDENTITY ---

PE IMPORTS (DANGEROUS):
  kernel32.dll: GetProcAddress, VirtualAlloc, WinExec

COMPILER AND PACKER:
  [Compiler] Borland Delphi
  [Linker] Turbo Linker
  Packers: {'PEiD': 'BobSoft Mini Delphi -> BoB / BobSoft'}

PE SECTIONS (entropy):

capa_sig_names: generate random numbers using the Delphi LCG
link function at runtime on Windows
check for time delay via GetTickCount
contain a thread local storage (.tls) section
